data.title: House passed 3 key bills: CLARITY market structure bill, GENIUS stablecoin bill, and Anti-CBDC bill, marking major wins for crypto.
data.description: On Thursday, the House approved three significant bills related to digital assets. These include the CLARITY market structure bill for digital assets, the GENIUS stablecoin bill, and an Anti-CBDC bill. This move marks a successful Crypto Week, with these key bills passing in the House. The bills aim to bring clarity to the market structure for digital assets, regulate stablecoins like GENIUS, and establish safeguards against Central Bank Digital Currencies. This development is seen as a major victory for the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Abbott Labs stock drops 8% due to below-expected organic sales outlook for 2025, despite beating quarterly estimates.
data.description: Shares of Abbott took a hit on Thursday as the healthcare corporation provided a conservative forecast for its organic sales in 2025. Despite exceeding quarterly expectations, the stock plummeted by 8%, causing concern among investors. This unexpected guidance miss put pressure on Abbott Laboratories, which has been a reliable player in the market. Investors reacted to the news, resulting in a significant drop in the stock price. This downturn came after the company's positive quarterly performance, indicating a discrepancy between short-term success and long-term projections. The market's reaction underscored the importance of forward-looking guidance and its impact on investor confidence.

data.title: Blackstone stock up 6.6% this week, poised for 5th consecutive weekly gain, showing strong technical performance.
data.description: Blackstone has seen a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. The stock has surged by 6.6% this week, marking the fifth consecutive week of gains. Investors are now wondering if this positive momentum will be sustained.

data.title: North American Construction Group Ltd. will report Q2 results on August 13, 2025, with a conference call on August 14 at 7:00 am MT.
data.description: Acheson, Alberta, July 17, 2025 - The North American Construction Group Ltd. (NACG) will unveil its financial performance for the second quarter ending June 30, 2025, on August 13, 2025, post markets closure. An ensuing conference call and webcast are scheduled for August 14, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET). NACG, trading as NOA.TO/NYSE:NOA, will provide insights into its Q2 figures during this event. Stay tuned for further updates on the company’s financial standing.

data.title: Halcones Precious Metals' AGM results: Over 96% votes cast elected nominees as directors; approved auditors & stock option plan.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Halcones Precious Metals Corp. (TSXV: HPM) announced that the nominees outlined in the June 5, 2025 management proxy circular were successfully elected as directors during the annual and special meeting of shareholders. The appointments of these nominees were overwhelmingly approved, with over 96% of the votes cast at the meeting in favor. Shareholders also gave their nod to the Company's auditors and stock option plan during the same session.

data.title: BAY Miner launches mobile cloud mining app allowing users to mine Bitcoin from smartphones. Democratizing mining with eco-friendly approach.(KeyCode: 115)
data.description: BAY Miner, a digital asset mining solutions leader, has launched a mobile cloud mining app allowing users to mine Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies from their smartphones without complex setups. This move aims to democratize mining, making it accessible to all, regardless of expertise or capital. The app is user-friendly, uses renewable energy, and is available on Android and iOS platforms. It minimizes data usage and battery drain, offering a sustainable way for millions to earn passive income securely. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.
WHITE HOUSE SAYS TRUMP SIGNED FOUR PROCLAMATIONS, EACH GRANTING TWO YEARS OF REGULATORY RELIEF FROM BIDEN-ERA REGULATIONS IMPACTING SECTORS VITAL TO SECURITY

data.title: New Return-It Express & GO station added to King George Blvd Superstore in Surrey BC for convenient recycling.
data.description: A new Return-It Express & GO station for used beverage containers has been established in Surrey, British Columbia. This station, located at the Real Canadian Superstore on 7550 King George Blvd, aims to enhance recycling accessibility in the community. Part of Return-It's initiative towards a circular economy, the station provides a convenient drop-off option for Surrey residents. By offering a user-friendly and swift process, this station contributes to making recycling more convenient.

data.title: HK Monetary Authority to reopen 3-year Govt Bonds on July 23, 2025. HK$2.0 billion at 2.76% interest rate.
data.description: On July 23, 2025, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority is set to relaunch the 3-year HKD Institutional Government Bonds, providing HK$2.0 billion at an interest rate of 2.76%.

White House: ‘Today, President Donald J. Trump signed an Executive Order creating a new classification of non-career federal workers, “Schedule G” employees, to better serve Americans’ needs by focusing on implementing Administration policies.’

data.title: Union Pacific in talks to acquire Norfolk Southern in $60 billion mega-merger, pending regulator approval.
data.description: Union Pacific Corp, listed on NYSE as UNP, is reportedly in initial talks to acquire Norfolk Southern Corp, listed on NYSE as NSC. This potential merger could have significant implications within the railroad sector. The discussions, described as early-stage, may or may not lead to a final agreement, and approval from regulators is not assured. For further information, the complete story can be found through Benzinga.com.

data.title: Texas Instruments board declares $1.36 per share quarterly dividend, payable on August 12, 2025 to stockholders of record.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.36 per common stock share. This dividend will be paid on August 12, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as such on July 31, 2025. Texas Instruments is a company known for its innovative technology solutions.

data.title: June inflation data shows rising dynamics, validating Powell's stance. Headline inflation hits 2.7%, the highest since February, with CPI up 0.3%. Core inflation at 2.9%, slightly below 3%. Powell resists rate cuts, facing Trump pressure.
data.description: President Trump's push for aggressive rate cuts collided with rising inflation in June, with headline inflation reaching 2.7% year over year, the highest level since February. The Consumer Price Index rose 0.3% monthly, the largest increase in five months, and core inflation was 2.9% year over year. Despite Trump's calls, Federal Reserve Chair Powell has resisted lowering interest rates due to uncertainty from rising tariffs. Powell's cautious approach seems justified, as June's inflation data was in line with economists' forecasts. Trump's demand for rate cuts may not be feasible in the current economic reality.

data.title: Mativ Holdings will release Q2 2025 results on August 6, 2025, with a discussion call scheduled on August 7 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Mativ Holdings, Inc. disclosed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 6, 2025, post market closure. A conference call has been arranged for 8:30 a.m. ET on August 7, 2025, to discuss these results. Stakeholders can join the call through webcast or phone. The details for access are provided below. An internet replay of the call will be available on Mativ’s website at ir.mativ.com in the Investors section shortly after the event.

data.title: NYC labor unions back Freedom Plaza's $11.1B project, creating 17,000 high-paying union jobs, economic growth.
data.description: Labor leaders are showing enthusiastic backing for a project that aims to generate 17,000 well-paying union jobs and boost economic development in New York City. This initiative, known as Freedom Plaza, involves a considerable investment of $11.1 billion and focuses on enhancing the civic and cultural landscape of Midtown Manhattan's East side.

data.title: The Becker Milk Company Limited announces 2025 annual financial results in Toronto on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Toronto, the Becker Milk Company Limited shared positive news about their financial performance for the fiscal year ending on April 30, 2025. The company, listed on the TSX as BEK.B, expressed satisfaction with the results achieved during this period.

data.title: SERMs market projected to grow 2020-2034 due to rising demand in oncology & women's health. Increase in clinical trials & regulatory approvals.
data.description: The market for Selective Estrogen Receptor Modulators (SERMs) is expected to witness significant growth in the upcoming years. This growth can be attributed to the increasing number of cancer cases, heightened awareness regarding SERMs, and a notable increase in the amount of SERMs in clinical trials or pending regulatory approval from several companies. The market is forecasted to experience a surge in demand due to these factors.

data.title: Truist will redeem $1.5 billion principal amount of senior notes due July 2026 on July 28, 2025.
data.description: Charlotte-based Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) revealed plans to redeem all $1.5 billion principal amount of its floating rate senior notes set to mature on July 28, 2026 (CUSIP 89788MAH5) on July 28, 2025.

data.title: Taco Cabana is hosting a margarita contest for National Tequila Day where guests can create a new flavor.
data.description: In celebration of National Tequila Day, the Mexican-inspired restaurant chain Taco Cabana® in San Antonio is offering special promotions for its customers. Customers can enjoy discounts and deals at the restaurant to mark this occasion.
